agentMessage.excerpt:
The implementation is already complete and verified:

- **`apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.ts`**: `getAttrDef(tagName, attrName)` is exported (line 212), delegating to `getTagDef` for case-insensitive tag lookup and then doing a case-insensitive attribute name match via `.find()`.
- **`apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.test.ts`**: Four test cases under `describe('getAttrDef', ...)` cover known attribute, case-insensitive match, unknown tag, and known-tag/unknown-attribute — all imported and passing.

Both `npm run test` (full suite: 268 tests, 14 files) and the focused `tags.test.ts` run (23 tests) are green. Build also compiles cleanly.

**Summary**: Added `getAttrDef(tagName, attrName)` to the SSML tag registry with four vitest cases — case-insensitive attribute lookup on the existing tag definitions, no other modules touched.
